form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 401m at Richmond. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 401m at Richmond. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Wentworth Park (43.29) in a Mix, finishing a 17 length second. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Wentworth Park (43.29) in a Mix, finishing a 17 length second. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Has ability and looks a key chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and ran wide.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (20.67) at this track over 365m. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (36.82) when fourth over 630m at this track in a Grade 5. Starts from box 5 for the first time here. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at Wentworth Park over 720m. The start prior was at his best with a 6 length win over 630m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 630m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
